app.title: Chess Coach
app.tagline: AI-powered analysis of your Chess.com games
app.footer: Powered by Stockfish engine analysis and AI coaching

home.estimatedDuration: Usually about {min}-{max}s depending on Chess.com, engine, and AI response time.

errors.noGames: No games found for this user

results.gamesAnalyzed: {count, plural, one {# game analyzed} other {# games analyzed}}

timePressure.label: {percent}% of your errors happened under time pressure
timePressure.warning: Clock management is a real leak in these games.

results.startWithPuzzles: Start With {count, plural, one {# mistake puzzle} other {# mistake puzzles}}
results.themePractice: Practice identifying {category} patterns - you had {count, plural, one {# error} other {# errors}} in this area across your recent games.
results.practiceFirstMistake: Practice the first critical mistake from this game

puzzleTrainer.youPlayed: You played {move} ({classification}) on move {number}. Find a better move to avoid losing {evalDescription} (~{evalPawns}).
puzzleTrainer.hintGeneric: Look for the move that improves your position the most.
puzzleTrainer.hintPiece: The best move involves the piece on {square}.
puzzleTrainer.afterMoveDisabled: Solving is disabled in this view. Switch back to before move to play the puzzle.
puzzleTrainer.feedbackCorrectDescription: That move holds the position together better than {move}.
puzzleTrainer.feedbackWrongHint: You can reveal the solution, get a hint, or keep trying.
puzzleTrainer.feedbackWrongQuick: Look for the move that reduces the danger immediately.
puzzleTrainer.solutionExplanation: Your move {played} let the evaluation fall quickly. {best} is the practical repair.

evalDescriptions.pieceAdvantage: roughly a piece worth of advantage

revealExplanation.tactics: The engine line works because it deals with the forcing tactical idea before your opponent can exploit it.
revealExplanation.kingSafety: The engine move reduces pressure on your king and removes the most dangerous attacking continuation.
revealExplanation.pieceSafety: The engine move keeps your loose pieces defended and avoids letting the position collapse tactically.
revealExplanation.default: The engine move keeps more control of the position and avoids the tactical or structural damage caused by your move.

progressSummary.title: Your Progress
progressSummary.emptyDescription: Finish a few analyses and this area will start showing trend lines.
progressSummary.sparklineLabel: Average blunders per game over the last {count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}}
